result_note: Mouse is a project-policy short-lived control. Reviewed UniProtKB Swiss-Prot P23804 records Mus musculus MDM2, taxid 10090, a complete 489-aa canonical sequence, and protein-level evidence. Accepted for Gate 7 technical planning only. Aggregate Gate 7 remains closed because TP53 is deferred pending source. No sequence, embedding, structure, or biological claim is produced.

evidence_source_database: NCBI Gene and RefSeq with UniProtKB TrEMBL cross-references
result_note: Rat is a project-policy short-lived control. NCBI Gene 314856 records validated RefSeq protein NP_001426446.1 for Mdm2, but the maintained product links to three UniProtKB TrEMBL accessions: A0A0G2JVC1, A6IGT1, and D3ZVH5. No canonical UniProt accession is accepted in this review. The row is needs_manual_review and is not admitted to the Gate 7 strict panel. Absence of an earlier committed row is not treated as absence of an ortholog.

Hamster is a project-policy short-lived control. Reviewed UniProtKB Swiss-Prot Q60524 records Mesocricetus auratus MDM2, taxid 10036, length 466 amino acids, and transcript-level evidence. UniProt marks the sequence as Fragment, so the row is deferred_pending_source and is not admitted to the Gate 7 strict panel until a complete accession-level source is reviewed.
